changeSet.author: patrick.heusser
changeSet.createView: SELECT mf.id, mf.file_id, mf.cre_date, mf.exif_gps_location_long, mf.exif_gps_location_lat, mf.exif_gps_location, mf.exif_gps_date, mf.exif_date_image_taken, mf.camera_make, mf.camera_model, ixf.index AS f_index, ixf.name AS f_name, ixf.path AS f_path, ixf.base_path AS f_base_path, ixf.full_path AS f_full_path, ixf.size AS f_size, ixf.indexer_id AS f_indexer_id, ixf.last_modified_date AS f_last_modified_date, ixf.index_added_date AS f_index_added_date, ixf.index_update_date AS f_index_update_date, ixf.indexer_status AS f_indexer_status, ixf.last_message AS f_last_message FROM media_file mf LEFT JOIN indexed_file ixf ON ixf.id = mf.file_id
